title: Swarm War

{{Quote|There are times when the end justifies the means. But when you build an argument based on a whole series of such times, you may find that you've constructed an entire philosophy of evil.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
The '''Swarm War''' was a brief, but devastating war fought in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] and [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] in [[36 ABY]] between the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] (who were supported by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and [[New Jedi Order]]) and [[the Colony]], which consisted of [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] and their [[Joiner]] allies. It was a continuation of the [[Dark Nest Crisis]] in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]]. Although the Galactic Alliance attempted to ally with the Chiss, elements of the Jedi sided with the Killiks, and thus the Chiss believed the Alliance was aiding the Colony. Despite this, they largely accepted the Alliance support.

==History==
Attempts to prevent war were ruined when [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] attacked a military supply depot of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]] in an attempt to lure them into a pre-emptive strike against the Killiks. The Killiks responded by attacking the Galactic Alliance forces [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockading]] the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]]. Following the defeat of the Killik forces in this region, the Galactic Alliance declared open war against the Killik colonies.

The Killiks quickly gained allies for the coming conflict. In addition to the many Joiners that had fallen under their influence during the Yuuzhan Vong invasion, many members of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] various insectoid races (among them the [[Fefze]], the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]], the [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]], the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]], and the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]) fell under their influence and became addicted to the [[Gorog|Dark Nest's]] [[Membrosia/Legends|black membrosia]]. Many of them became Joiners as well, doing so much faster than the average humanoid.

During the war, the forces of the Galactic Alliance were led by [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] (having replaced [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Sien Sovv]], who was killed by the Killiks in an accident some weeks prior) and the [[New Jedi Order]] by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

Among the major conflicts that occurred during this time involved a battle on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], where a Killik led coup by [[tarhead]] Vratix led to a complete halt of the production of the healing fluid [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]. Despite the loss, the Alliance eventually rallied together and won the conflict.

However, the conflict had led Luke Skywalker to come to the conclusion that the [[New Jedi Order]] had become too interconnected with the politics of the Galactic Alliance to hold fast to its mandate to be the protectors of truth and justice (in much the same way that the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Old Jedi Order]] had become too involved with the politics of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]). To that end, he declared himself Grand Master of the Jedi Order, and established a new Jedi Council to help him advise the Galactic Alliance government. He also withdrew the Jedi from [[Cal Omas]]'s Advisory council, stating that the Jedi should serve, not govern.
